verdict: An outstanding Medium chart with flawless syncopation, highly satisfying circular streams, and excellent physical pacing.

issues.problem: The first two notes in the intro feel slightly off-grid, drifting away from the perfect 160 BPM structure established when the main beat drops.
The 16th transition from U to R immediately following a D tap forces a slight slide or double-tap on the right foot, disrupting the otherwise flawless alternating flow.
